ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal (M/F) */,
  "birth_month" TEXT /* Month the animal was born (MM/DD/YYYY) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the animal was born */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the animal */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the animal */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the animal */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is spayed/neutered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "breed_group" TEXT /* Group the breed belongs to (e.g., Sporting, Working, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the owner lives in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner who owns the license */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal associated with the license */,
  "license_issued_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "license_expired_date" TEXT /* Date the license expired */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., one-year, three-year, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the animal was registered */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., initial, renewal, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the zip code belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_districts" (
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community district */,
  "community_district" INTEGER /* Community district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the community district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "census_tract" INTEGER /* Census tract */,
  "community_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community district the census tract belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_tracts_community_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_district_id") REFERENCES community_districts ("community_district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ntas" (
  "nta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NTA */,
  "nta" TEXT /* NTA */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the NTA belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ntas_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_council_districts" (
  "city_council_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city council district */,
  "city_council_district" INTEGER /* City council district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the city council district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_council_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_council_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "congressional_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "congressional_district" INTEGER /* Congressional district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the congressional district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("congressional_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_senatorial_districts" (
  "state_senatorial_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state senatorial district */,
  "state_senatorial_district" INTEGER /* State senatorial district */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the state senatorial district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_senatorial_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_senatorial_districts_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, veterinarian, animal control officer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal that received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was given */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination (e.g., rabies, distemper, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_checks" (
  "health_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health check */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal that received the health check */,
  "health_check_date" TEXT /* Date the health check was performed */,
  "health_check_result" TEXT /* Result of the health check (e.g., healthy, sick, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_checks_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_animal" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id", "animal_id")
)
